cross_scene_arcs.title: The Infiltration of Admiration
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve initiates and executes her calculated entry into Margo Channing's world by presenting herself as a humble, devoted fan, leveraging awe and deference to gain access to the exclusive theater circle.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve stands anonymously outside the theater, observing from a distance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve is personally escorted backstage by Karen, fully immersed in the sacred space of the theater elite.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The authenticity of Eve's admiration remains ambiguous—whether her wonder is genuine or a performance to manipulate her way in.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Devotion to Domination
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve ascends from guest to gatekeeper within Margo's household, transforming from an assistant into the central figure managing Margo's personal and professional life, consolidating power through emotional labor and control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve moves into Margo's home as a temporary companion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve intercepts communications and manages Margo's schedule, asserting authority over access to Margo and marginalizing others like Birdie.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The line between loyalty and manipulation blurs, raising questions about whether Eve serves Margo or is systematically replacing her.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Mirror and the Mask
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's unconscious mimicry of Margo evolves into active usurpation, culminating in a public performance that supplants Margo's authority, triggering an unspoken but escalating power struggle between mentor and protégée.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve is caught imitating Margo in private, revealing her deep psychological identification with her.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve delivers a career-defining audition in Margo's absence, recognized by insiders as a transformative talent destined to eclipse her.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Margo witnesses Eve's imitation and rise with quiet dread, but the conflict remains unvoiced, leaving the battle for legacy unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Love, Ambition, and Betrayal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve's relationship with Bill shifts from intellectual curiosity to romantic pursuit, revealing her desire not just to enter Margo's world but to claim it entirely—culminating in rejection and a strategic realignment with Addison that severs her from Margo's circle.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve engages Bill in conversation about Hollywood, positioning herself as a thoughtful confidante.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: After Bill rejects her romantic advance, Eve aligns with Addison, gaining elite validation while becoming publicly framed as Margo's successor.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eve's feelings for Bill may have been genuine or purely strategic; her humiliation fuels vengeance, but her true emotional investment remains unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Rise and Fall of a Constructed Self
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eve ascends to the peak of theatrical acclaim through deception and performance, only to be stripped of her identity when exposed—mirroring her own tactics as a new acolyte, Phoebe, begins to replicate her journey.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eve steps out of the shadows to begin her ascent as a fan seeking entry.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eve receives the highest honor in her field but privately discards it, then collapses under exposure, only to find herself mirrored by a new aspirant.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Phoebe's presence suggests the cycle will repeat—Eve may have lost her power, but the machinery of ambition continues, raising questions about whether she will resist, mentor, or be consumed anew.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Advocate to Accomplice: Karen's Complicity in Eve's Rise
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen evolves from a curious observer to an active enabler of Eve's integration into Margo's world, driven by genuine admiration and a desire to share the theater's inner sanctum. Her repeated facilitation of Eve's access—emotionally, socially, and professionally—unwittingly empowers Eve's ascent, culminating in her advocacy for Eve as understudy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Karen is intrigued by Eve's devotion and sees her as a sincere fan worthy of introduction to Margo.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Karen becomes a committed ally, actively supporting Eve's ambitions and embedding her deeper into Margo's circle.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Karen remains blind to Eve's manipulation, mistaking calculated performance for authenticity, which leaves her vulnerable to future betrayal.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fracturing of Loyalty: Karen's Shifting Allegiance Between Margo and Eve
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen's emotional loyalty shifts from Margo to Eve and then back again, reflecting her internal conflict between admiration for ambition and fidelity to friendship. Initially drawn to Eve's apparent humility, she later recoils upon realizing Eve's role in Margo's humiliation, ultimately reaffirming her allegiance to Margo.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Karen begins to emotionally disengage from Margo, captivated by Eve's rising prominence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Karen rejects Eve's narrative and reaffirms her loyalty to Margo, recognizing the damage Eve has caused.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The tension between Karen's desire for progress and her moral obligation to loyalty remains unresolved, especially as Eve continues to gain power.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Observer to Target: Karen's Awakening to Eve's Manipulation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen transitions from skeptical observer to a direct victim of Eve's schemes, as she uncovers the depth of Eve's manipulation and is ultimately blackmailed into complicity. Her growing awareness culminates in a crisis of conscience and powerlessness.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Karen begins to suspect Eve's sincerity, probing her intentions with cautious concern.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Karen is emotionally devastated and morally compromised, forced into silence by Eve's blackmail.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Karen is trapped between protecting Margo and preserving her own reputation, with no clear path to resistance or redemption.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Erosion of Influence: Karen's Marginalization in Art and Marriage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: As Eve ascends, Karen's influence wanes both professionally and personally. She witnesses Lloyd's emotional pivot toward Eve, is excluded from key decisions, and is ultimately abandoned when he chooses Eve over her—marking her transformation from insider to isolated outsider.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Karen attempts to mediate and stabilize the artistic and emotional tensions within the group.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Karen is emotionally abandoned and professionally erased, recognizing her diminishing role in both the theater and her marriage.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Karen's future agency—whether she will confront Lloyd, reclaim her voice, or withdraw permanently—remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Moral Crossroads: Karen's Failed Intervention and Ethical Dilemma
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Karen formulates a plan—'the boot in the rear'—to correct Margo's behavior, believing Eve's rise might serve as a necessary wake-up call. But as Eve's manipulation unfolds, Karen's intended corrective action becomes entangled in betrayal, forcing her to abandon her plan and confront her own complicity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Karen considers intervening to help Margo by allowing Eve's influence to challenge her, hoping it will lead to growth.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Karen rejects the idea entirely, recognizing that Eve's ascent is not reformative but destructive, and that her own role has been corrupted.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Karen's hesitation and ultimate inaction leave her morally adrift, questioning whether she could have changed the outcome if she had acted sooner or more decisively.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Erosion of Trust: From Devotion to Deception
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo's relationship with Eve evolves from one of flattered acceptance to growing suspicion as Eve's seemingly loyal admiration reveals itself as calculated infiltration. What begins as fan worship gradually transforms into a power play, with Eve assuming control over Margo's personal and professional space, ultimately triggering Margo's dawning awareness of betrayal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo is the admired center of Eve's world; Eve's devotion feels flattering and affirming.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo begins to suspect Eve is not loyal but is instead studying and replacing her, eroding trust.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Eve's actions are driven by genuine emotional attachment or a cold, strategic ambition to usurp Margo remains ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Dependence and the Fear of Abandonment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo's emotional reliance on Bill is exposed as fragile, and his departure catalyzes a transfer of dependence onto Eve. Her fear of aging and being replaced manifests in jealousy and insecurity, culminating in a precarious emotional realignment where she places trust in the very person poised to supplant her.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo is emotionally tied to Bill, whose departure triggers vulnerability and fear of irrelevance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo shifts emotional dependence from Bill to Eve, accepting her as a surrogate companion and confidante.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Margo's need for validation leaves her susceptible to manipulation, and her emotional instability remains unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Collapse of Professional Authority
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo's status as the undisputed star of the production deteriorates as Eve ascends without her knowledge or consent. From being absent at a critical audition to being publicly replaced in her dressing room and role, Margo's professional identity is systematically undermined, culminating in her isolation and defiance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo is the central figure in the production, expected to uphold her role and influence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo is marginalized, her authority rejected by peers, and her position threatened by Eve's rise.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The legitimacy of Margo's standing in the theater company remains in jeopardy, with no resolution on whether she will retain her role or be replaced.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Mask of Control vs. Inner Turmoil
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo repeatedly attempts to project control and composure in the face of mounting personal and professional threats, but her internal anxiety and fear of obsolescence erupt into outbursts and confrontations. Her struggle to maintain dignity masks a deepening crisis of identity and self-worth.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo performs authority in her dressing room, masking discomfort with theatricality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo's façade collapses in public, revealing emotional breakdown and isolation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Margo has not reconciled her public persona with her private fears, leaving her vulnerable to further emotional and professional destabilization.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Mentorship That Masks a Takeover
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Margo's initial acceptance of Eve as a protégée evolves into a tragic reversal where mentorship becomes a vehicle for displacement. Eve's integration into Margo's life—welcomed as loyalty—enables her to assume Margo's roles, relationships, and identity, culminating in a symbolic and emotional replacement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Margo allows Eve into her home and life, viewing her as a devoted young fan in need of guidance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Margo realizes she has been replaced in her own life—by costume, space, and relationships—as Eve ascends with the support of powerful allies.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of Eve's deception and the complicity of figures like Addison remain hidden, leaving Margo's retaliation untested and the threat unresolved.
